mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To preserve Kurdish cultural heritage, support newly arrived Kurdish families, and build bridges between the Kurdish and American communities in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We are dedicated to preserving and promoting Kurdish culture while helping Kurdish families integrate into American society.
